title: hyoscyamus agrestis var. sinuatus
intro: Hyoscyamus agrestis var. sinuatus, also known as wild henbane, is a plant species within the henbane genus, belonging to the nightshade family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its antispasmodic, anticholinergic, and sedative effects. The health benefits of wild henbane include relief from muscle spasms, menstrual cramps, and anxiety, as well as its use as a natural remedy for insomnia and coughs. Wild henbane can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, although its use should be approached with caution due to its potential toxicity and side effects.
